title: Introduction to monday Dev ANZ webinar 18 January
excerpt: We invite you to explore the functions of these new monday products in a series of short 30-minute live A/NZ webinars. Hear a quick summary of the functions and then see the product demonstrated by one of our local sp…

posts.author: Ania (Ania Bokina APJ Marketing at monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1140×482 37.1 KB

We invite you to explore the functions of these new monday products in a series of short 30-minute live A/NZ webinars. Hear a quick summary of the functions and then see the product demonstrated by one of our local specialists.

First webinar is monday Dev: empower your development teams to build better products

Webinar Thursday 18 Jan 2pm AEDT (Sydney, Melbourne)

[Register here]

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I am excited for this one! Thanks for sharing Ania
